creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Phillip,

Phillip Neumann wrote:
> What asterisk version are you using?

I use the version:
asterisk-1.4.11_2

> Can you make sure that the files in grep
> "\.h" /usr/ports/net/asterisk/pkg-plist
> Are all okey?...

if all are ok I'm not sure but I picked out some files and they are
installed fine (/usr/local/include/asterisk contains 89 files).
The asterisk port installed fine so I think all files are installed
correctly.

> Ive seen similar things, when old .h files lied around.

ok that cannot be the case because the system is completely installed
from scratch onto a new and empty harddisk (really a fresh
installation); so maybe some dependencies are missing?

Best regards,
Matthias

-- 

"Programming today is a race between software engineers striving to
build bigger and better idiot-proof programs, and the universe trying to
produce bigger and better idiots. So far, the universe is winning." --
Rich Cook
